arts.ttl: Barca fans banned from next UCL away game after racist behavior
arts.sum: “FC Barcelona communicate that UEFA have applied a €10,000 fine and banned the sale of tickets for an away Champions League game due to racist behaviour by some fans during the first matchday game played by the men’s football first team at the Stade Louis II in Monaco on 19 September. “The Club communicate that it will both comply with and apply this sanction for the UEFA Champions League matchday four fixture that the team will play against FK Crvena zvezda in Belgrade on 6 November.
